results.title: Comment on: Perpétuo Para Público Frio: Conheça O “Funil De VSL” | Tiago Filemon - Segredos da Escala #161
results.excerpt: João e Thiago eu só tenho a agradecer a vocês por fornecerem este conteúdo gratuitamente. Eu me comprometo que nos meus primeiros R$100k com direct response darei o depoimento mencionando que este podcast foi a minha virada de chave. Vocês não tem a devida noção do impacto que este conteúdo está fazendo na minha vida já atualmente. Gratidão 👊🏼
results.author: @aenergiadavida

results.title: Show HN: Tokenbrook Vale, a cozy office village for your AI agents
results.excerpt:
Also running live at https://demo.tokenbrook.com - hook up your own Claude instances per instructions in the repo!

This is something I've been wanting to throw together for a few weeks; I thought it'd be a fun visualization of my agents running through Claude.

I'm a nerd for retro pixel art style games
results.author: jodacola

results.title: Comment on: What's Hot What's Not @ Harbor Freight's Memorial Day Sale!
results.excerpt:
I got the $35 haul master tri-ball hitch and was disappointed in how loose it fit into the receiver. What is your experience with the one with the hook?

Also the chrome was super thin and was easily damaged.
results.author: @stage3cam258
